SETTINGS_PORT__DESCRIPTION: Set the port for the draw.io client (Valid range: 0 to 65535)
SETTINGS_FOLDER__DESCRIPTION: Select the default folder where newly created diagrams will be saved.
SETTINGS_FILE_FORMAT__DESCRIPTION: Select the format used to generate names for new diagram files.
SETTINGS_CENTERING__DESCRIPTION: If enabled, diagrams will be automatically centered within the note.
SETTINGS_INTERACTIVE__DESCRIPTION: Enables interactivity for diagrams — clickable external/internal links and markdown previews.
SETTINGS_HOVER_SIZE__DESCRIPTION: Specify the diagram size inside the pop-up preview window on hover.
SETTINGS_THEME_PREVIEW__DESCRIPTION: Specify the color scheme for displaying diagrams in Preview mode.
SETTINGS_THEME_EDIT__DESCRIPTION: Specify the color scheme for displaying diagrams in Live Preview/Edit mode.
SETTINGS_EDITOR_THEME__DESCRIPTION: Select the UI theme for the draw.io editor itself.
SETTINGS_CANVAS_BORDER__DESCRIPTION: If enabled, outer borders of diagrams placed on the Obsidian Canvas will be hidden.
SETTINGS_CANVAS_LABEL__DESCRIPTION: If enabled, text labels of diagrams placed on the Obsidian Canvas will be hidden.
SETTINGS_CANVAS_FOCUS__DESCRIPTION: If enabled, diagrams on the Canvas will constantly remain focused, as if they were clicked.
SETTINGS_FOCUS_BORDER__DESCRIPTION: If enabled, the selection box around the diagram on the Canvas will be hidden when focused.
SETTINGS_CANVEL_TRANSPARENT__DESCRIPTION: Makes the diagram background transparent when placed on the Obsidian Canvas.
SETTINGS_THEME_CANVAS__NAME: Color scheme for diagrams on Canvas
SETTINGS_THEME_CANVAS__DESCRIPTION: Specify the color scheme to be used for diagrams inside the Obsidian Canvas.
SETTINGS_SCALE_COPY__DESCRIPTION: Set the scaling factor when copying a diagram as an image (higher values yield better quality).
SETTINGS_AUTO_UPDATE__DESCRIPTION: If enabled, the plugin will automatically check for and download the latest draw.io version on Obsidian startup.
FORMAT_SET_NAME: Ask when saving a new diagram
CANVAS__REPLACEIMAGETOSVG_ERROR: Error replacing Drawio image with SVG on Canvas:
DRAWIO_VERSION__FAILED_CHECK: Current version: {installed}. Failed to check for updates.
DRAWIO_VERSION__ACTUAL: You have the latest version installed: {installed}. No update required.
DRAWIO_VERSION__AVAILABLE: Update available! Current version: {installed} ➔ New version: {available}
DRAWIO_COMMAND__OPEN_DIAGRAM_UNDER_CURSO: Open diagram under cursor in draw.io editor
DRAWIO_COMMAND__OPEN_MODAL_DRAWIO_EDITOR: Open draw.io editor in modal window
DRAWIO_COMMAND__OPEN_DIAGRAM_UNDER_CURSO: Open diagram under cursor in modal draw.io editor
